policy.name: Partner
policy.description: Limited disclosure: Restricted to partner organizations. This information may be shared with partner organizations, selected suppliers, customers (pilots) and cooperating organizations, which have agreed to maintain appropriate information protection rules (e.g. by non-disclosure agreements). Recipients may share the information within their own organizations.
policy.documentation: Roughly corresponds to TLP:AMBER, and the information is supposed to be labeled as such when shared.
